description_long: This fitness center is a large, modern two-story building with a distinctive angular roof and a mix of materials including glass, concrete, and metal. The facade features expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, especially prominent on one side, allowing natural light to flood the interior spaces. There are multiple entry points, including a main entrance with double glass doors and a secondary access area, possibly for staff or deliveries. The structure includes a covered outdoor area, likely for social or fitness activities, and several balconies or terraces. The building sits on a broad, flat base, suggesting accessibility for pedestrians and vehicles. The overall design emphasizes openness, transparency, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A large, modern fitness center with angular roofs, extensive glass facades, and multiple entry points. The building features open terraces and a sleek, contemporary design.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, a mix of glass and concrete walls, and a covered outdoor area on the right.
description_view_1: From this side, the angular roof and the depth of the covered outdoor area are most visible, with less glass and more solid wall surfaces.
description_view_2: This view showcases the expansive glass facade, double glass doors, and a prominent balcony or terrace area.
description_view_3: Here, the rear and side of the building are visible, showing additional windows and the layered roof structure.
